reviews.comment:
Exelente i muy amable la atención de la chica  del servicompra

Excellent and very friendly service from the girl at the convenience store

reviews.comment:
Lento y mala atención

(Translated by Google)
Slow and poor service

reviews.comment:
Quise calibrar y luego de varios intentos, me dice el playero... "No anda bien". Podría antes decirlo o colocar un cartel.
Por el resto.... Bien

(Translated by Google)
I tried to calibrate it, and after several attempts, the attendant told me, "It's not working properly." He could have said so beforehand or put up a sign.
Otherwise... fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtMHBfbkF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. El playero  dice que no atiende ni abre los baños hasta las 6a.m. , cuando se supone que están abiertos las 24hs

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. The attendant says he doesn't serve customers or open the restrooms until 6 a.m., even though they're supposed to be open 24 hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtdDg2MTBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lo único que tiene de malo es que los fines de semana se queda sin combustible

(Translated by Google)
The only downside is that it runs out of fuel on weekends.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtdC1qVGZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre largas colas para cargar....un solo surtidor cargando en un ACA... Necesita mejorar servicio

(Translated by Google)
Always long lines to fill up... only one pump open at an ACA station... Service needs improvement

reviews.comment:
Muy amable y rápida atención, se puede pagar de todas las formas, baños limpios, cafetería con productos buenos y rápida atención.

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly and fast service, you can pay in all ways, clean bathrooms, cafeteria with good products and fast service.

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio en playa, pero el kiosko cerrado a las 18 hs, un feriado!!!

(Translated by Google)
